jurisdiction: Suffolk County, NY — Mobile Food Vendors

permits.name: Suffolk County Mobile Food Service Permit
permits.issuer: Suffolk County Department of Health Services — Office of Food Protection
permits.required_for: Any pushcart, truck, trailer, or vehicle preparing or serving food to the public in Suffolk County.
permits.authority: NY State Sanitary Code Subpart 14-4 + Suffolk County Sanitary Code Article 13
prerequisites: Commissary agreement with an approved fixed food establishment
Plan review and pre-operational inspection of the unit
Certified Food Protection Manager on staff
Potable water tank + wastewater tank sized per code

permits.name: NY State Certificate of Authority (Sales Tax)
permits.issuer: NY State Department of Taxation and Finance
permits.required_for: Collecting sales tax on prepared food sales.
prerequisites: Registered business entity or sole-prop with EIN

permits.name: Food Protection Certificate (Manager)
permits.required_for: At least one certified manager must supervise food prep at all times.

permits.name: Commissary Agreement
permits.required_for: Daily cleaning, water refill, waste disposal, and food storage for the mobile unit.
prerequisites: Written agreement signed by commissary operator

permits.name: Town / Village Vending Permit
permits.issuer: Local town clerk (e.g., Huntington, Islip, Brookhaven, Southampton)
permits.required_for: Vending on town property, public streets, beaches, or parks.
permits.authority: Local municipal code — varies by township

permits.name: Fire Suppression System Inspection (if cooking with oil/grease)
permits.required_for: Any truck with an open flame, fryer, or grill.
permits.authority: NFPA 96 + NY State Uniform Fire Code
prerequisites: Installed ANSUL or equivalent suppression system

permits.name: General Liability Insurance
permits.required_for: Most towns and events require proof before issuing a vending permit.

conditional_permits.name: Temporary Food Service Permit
conditional_permits.when: Operating at a fair, festival, or special event for ≤14 consecutive days.
conditional_permits.issuer: Suffolk County Department of Health Services

conditional_permits.name: Parks Department Vending Concession
conditional_permits.when: Operating inside Suffolk County or NY State parks/beaches.
conditional_permits.issuer: Suffolk County Parks or NY State Parks
